title: 2025-08-26 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 15.74
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-08-26: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 15.74/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-08-26, the score printed 15.74/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
